ItacPersonItem.Notes: As Accademico Infecondo he signed Presagi di felicita` (1678), Nell`ospedale ogni male non viene per nuocere (1692). The author died in January 1692, according to Franchi, vol. I, p. 101.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
